meta.title: Karim ELShetihy | Explore
meta.description: Explore data engineering, analytics, science, DataOps, and AI topics.

data.title: Explore Data Fields
data.subtitle: Navigate through the core domains of modern data work. Select a field to browse topics and deep-dive guides.

categories.title: Data Engineering
categories.description: Infrastructure that moves, transforms, and stores data at scale.
categories.longDescription: Data engineering is the foundation of every modern data platform. It covers how raw data is ingested, modeled, orchestrated, and delivered reliably to downstream analytics, science, and product teams.

categories.title: Data Analytics & BI
categories.description: Turning data into insights through BI, metrics, and reporting.
categories.longDescription: Data analytics focuses on measurement, visualization, and decision support — from semantic models and dashboards to self-service reporting and KPI design.

categories.title: Data Science & ML
categories.description: Statistical modeling, experimentation, and predictive analytics.
categories.longDescription: Data science combines statistics, programming, and domain knowledge to build models, run experiments, and extract patterns that guide strategic decisions.

categories.title: Cloud & DataOps
categories.description: Cloud computing, CI/CD, observability, and quality for data systems.
categories.longDescription: Cloud computing, CI/CD, observability, and quality for data systems. DataOps applies software engineering practices to data pipelines — version control, testing, monitoring, and deployment automation for trustworthy data delivery.

categories.title: Data Architecture
categories.description: Lakehouse, medallion, and data mesh patterns for scalable platforms.
categories.longDescription: Data architecture covers lakehouse, medallion, and data mesh patterns for scalable platforms.

categories.title: Agentic AI
categories.description: Agentic AI workflows, LLMs,RAG, and prompt engineering
categories.longDescription: Agentic AI covers agentic AI workflows, large language models, retrieval-augmented generation, prompt engineering, and practical agent workflows for business automation.
